why: CHART: range breakout, 3 rising 5-min closes 7126.2>7129.5>7132.3, 5-min momo +0.11% accelerating, above VWAP 7126.85, pushing 70% of range toward 7137.9 day high. GEX CONFIRM: pika FLOOR reformed at 7120 under price (+9.8M growing), NO wall overhead, nearest node above is 7155 pika MAGNET/king (+12.8M growing), positive-gamma regime supports orderly grind. Target the 7155 magnet, first hurdle 7137.9 day high.

CHART: breakout failed — price fully retraced the 7132.3 push back to VWAP 7127 (underlying -0.05%), 5-min momo rolled negative, no continuation. Thesis was breakout-continuation; it is broken (bull trap on a chop day). GEX: regime slipped back to negative-gamma (net -4M), risk of flush to 7100 if VWAP/7120 lose. Exit fast per discipline, cap the small loss.

CHART: CONFIRMED range breakout — cleared 7137.9 day high with two up-closes 7138.4>7138.6, new day high 100% of range, 15-min momo accelerating +0.12%, above VWAP 7129. Waited for this exact break (rejected 4x prior). GEX CONFIRM: positive-gamma +20M supports orderly grind, 7155 pika MAGNET (+19M) directly overhead with NO wall between, floor 7120 below. Path open 7138.6->7155 (~16pts) vs tight ~5pt invalidation under 7134/7137.9. Target the 7155 magnet, cap into it.

CHART: breakout thrust ran 7138.6->7144.4 then stalled and pulled back to 7141.6, 15-min momo decelerating +0.20%->+0.11%. Banking the green. GEX: positive gamma re-strengthened to +16M (pin reasserting at the new local high = dealers sell to pin, caps upside). Cap 0DTE winner into the stall per discipline — this tape round-trips every push; take the gain rather than risk giving it back to breakeven.

CHART: PIN BREAK-FLUSH — price sliced through the 7130 floor AND the 7119.15 day low to a new low 7115.95, strongest down momentum of day (5-min -0.23%), below VWAP, pos 0% of range. Transition OUT of the midday pin = where 0DTE moves. GEX CONFIRM: +80M positive-gamma pin COLLAPSED and flipped to NEGATIVE-gamma (net -8M, levels break/trend = fuel), 7130 pika now overhead resistance (broken floor), and nearest floor below is way down at 7065 = ~51pt air pocket. Short the flush, target continuation to 7090-7085, invalidate on reclaim of 7125.

CHART: strongest down-flush of the day rode from entry 7115.95 to 7099.60 (~20pts, position +0.23% = big 0DTE put gain). Move is now very extended (~38pts from midday pin) and a 7100 barney formed just overhead. GEX: negative gamma at an EXTREME -86M — mean-reversion/snapback risk elevated exactly here; 7080 barney king target only ~19pts further. Bank the big 0DTE winner per discipline (they round-trip violently) rather than chase the last leg.

CHART: decisive breakdown of the 7080 base that held 4x (7084.9/7085.5/7084.4/7083.3) — 13:40 candle 7080.8->7074.2, new day low, 5-min momo re-accelerated to -0.30% (strongest since the primary flush). Base-break releases coiled stops + continuation. GEX CONFIRM: negative-gamma -83M (levels break = fuel), 7080 barney flips to overhead resistance (-28.4M), target the strong building 7050 floor (+21.7M). Extended 2nd leg into a close floor so managing tight: target ~7055, invalidate on reclaim of 7082.

CHART: short rode 7074.17->7061.05 (~13pts, +0.19% favorable) on the base-break continuation leg. GEX: approaching the strong building 7050 floor (+22.0M) just ~11pts below (the target/opposing node), and negative gamma is easing (-83M->-56M) = momentum fading into support. Bank the 0DTE gain into the floor rather than risk a sharp bounce off +22M support on this whippy tape.

CHART: negative-gamma squeeze broke the 7095 barney — 14:00 candle closed at its high 7100.0, 15-min momo surging +0.73%, V-bounce off the 7050 floor now extending. GEX CONFIRM: deeply negative gamma -113M (dealers short gamma forced to BUY into rally = squeeze fuel; levels break/extend), the 7095 barney is now GONE — nearest node above is the 7130 pika with ~30pts clear air and NO wall between, 7080 barney flips to support below. Stronger than the earlier 7096 fakeout (closed at highs on strong momo, barney cleared). Target 7125-7128 under the 7130 pika, tight stop under 7092, manage fast.

CHART: breakout FAILED — the 7100 barney re-formed and rejected price, which faded below my 7100.04 entry to 7096.4 (-0.05%), 5-min momo weakening. Entry premise (clean 7095 break with clear air to 7130) is invalidated; 7100 is a wall, not open air (whippy neg-gamma structure flickered). GEX: 7100 barney (-22.5M) holding as resistance in violent -112M gamma; failed breakout risks a sharp reversal to 7080/7050. Cut the small loss fast per exit discipline.

CHART: 30-min consolidation above 7100 resolved UP — 3 higher closes 7106.6>7108.1>7112.8, 14:30 solid green candle, momo improving (5-min +0.10%, 15-min +0.14%), new local high 7112.8. GEX CONFIRM: 7130 pika is a STRONG magnet (+28.4M, growing) directly overhead with CLEAR air/no wall, 7090 barney support below, negative gamma EASING -140M->-83M as price squeezes up (dealers covering = squeeze fuel). Cleaner than the 7100 fakeouts (held 30min, now breaking out on momo toward the magnet). Target 7127-7128 under the 7130 pika, tight stop under 7106.

CHART: squeeze stalled at 7118.5, pulled back to 7112.9 (breakeven), 5-min momo rolled negative. GEX confirmation FLIPPED: negative gamma re-strengthened -18M->-89M (violent regime reasserting) and the 7130 pika lost KING status (7090 barney king again) — the easing-gamma + magnet-king squeeze thesis I entered on has reversed. Method: exit when the confirming regime flips. In this tape -80M+ gamma preceded the two prior violent 7100 fakeouts. Exit flat/breakeven to protect the strongly-positive day, no third fakeout.
